steps.title: Introduce the examples
steps.content: The words before the blank form a complete general claim about plants and mycorrhizae. The information after the blank gives examples that illustrate that claim.

steps.title: Use a colon
steps.content: A would treat the following material as a parallel clause, B creates a run-on, and C creates a comma splice. A colon correctly introduces the examples after the complete claim. The answer is D.
